thread_post: I built a Notion template that turns startup chaos into a clear roadmap. Here's what's inside 🧵👇

Phase 1: Idea Validation

Before writing a single line of code:
- Validate demand (talk to 10 people)
- Research competitors
- Register your business entity
- Define your MVP scope

Most founders skip this and regret it.

Phase 2-3: MVP Build → Pre-Launch

The template tracks:
- Every task by category (Legal/Finance/Marketing/Product)
- Budget with burn rate calculator
- Resource library (no more lost bookmarks)
- Competitor comparison board

Phase 4: Launch Day Playbook

Hour-by-hour checklist:
- 9 AM: Product Hunt goes live
- 10 AM: Twitter thread
- 11 AM: Email to waitlist
- 12 PM: Reddit post

Every action pre-planned. Zero panic.

Get it for $12 — works on free Notion.

Link in bio 🚀
